/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ecl_test_singleton.dir/singleton.cpp.o -o ecl_test_singleton  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ri-one/ri_one_master_ws/install/ecl_type_traits/lib ../../gtest/libgtest_main.a ../../gtest/libgtest.a -pthread /home/ri-one/ri_one_master_ws/install/ecl_type_traits/lib/libecl_type_traits.so.1.2.1
